meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve Stuck App Cycles
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Use our advanced SaaS starter kit, Antigravity, and Claude Code to ship high-end production software at 10x speed for your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop reinventing the wheel. The solution is a modular SaaS starter kit that abstracts authentication, billing, and database architecture. By pairing Antigravity’s rapid scaffolding with Claude Code’s autonomous engineering, you move from manual boilerplate to high-value feature development, allowing you to ship production-grade SaaS products in days instead of weeks.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you’re three weeks into a client project, and you’re still wrestling with user authentication, database migrations, and Stripe integration. The client is impatient, the scope is creeping, and your profit margins are evaporating. You aren't building a product; you're building a plumbing system.

It’s time to move up the value chain. By leveraging a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you stop being a code-monkey and start being a product architect. This guide reveals how to combine Antigravity with Claude Code to automate the heavy lifting, ensuring your code is production-ready, scalable, and delivered at a velocity that makes you the highest-paid freelancer in the room.

steps.title: Initialize the Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish the foundational directory structure and environment variables using the Antigravity framework to avoid configuration drift.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration using the hardened production boilerplate.

steps.title: Define Schema Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your client's business requirements directly into relational database models without manual SQL writing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with roles for Admin, Manager, and End-User.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on user requirements'

steps.title: Auth & Billing Injection
steps.description: Automate the complex integration of OAuth and subscription tiers to ensure your client's revenue pipeline is secure from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement Supabase Auth with Google OAuth and Stripe Checkout sessions for monthly and annual tiers.

steps.title: Component Library Deployment
steps.description: Rapidly deploy UI components that are accessibility-compliant and visually distinct, moving beyond standard Tailwind defaults.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a dashboard layout using the existing UI component library, focusing on data visualization widgets.

steps.title: Automated Testing & Audit
steps.description: Run an autonomous security and performance audit to catch edge cases before the first client deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Conduct a security audit on the current codebase and suggest performance optimizations for React Server Components.

pro_tips: Always wrap your custom business logic in a separate service layer so the starter kit can be upgraded without breaking your unique features.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store your client's specific design system tokens, ensuring consistency across every generated view.
Never hard-code Stripe webhooks; use the starter kit's event-bus architecture to decouple payment processing from user provisioning.
Run your database migrations through a staging branch first; use Claude Code to compare the diffs against production schemas automatically.
Inject telemetry at the API route level to track user engagement metrics for your clients without adding external bloat.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, document your custom component library to create a proprietary 'Agency Starter Pack' you can reuse for every future client.
content.conversion_block: Stop burning hours on boilerplate and start scaling your freelance business with elite-level workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
